strategy: Swing trades on high-beta NSE stocks during post-tariff market recovery. 2-4 day holds, 1.5:1+ R:R, max 95% capital deployed per trade.

trades.thesis: OLA Electric March registrations +150% MoM, ₹60k price cut on Roadster X+ driving demand surge. 34% up in 3 days on massive volume (78 crore shares today). Strong fundamental catalyst. Intraday momentum continuation play with EOD exit.

Abakkus Asset Manager (institutional) bought 9.7M shares at ₹54 on Apr 8 (bulk deal confirmed). Stock up 14% next day — smart money thesis confirmed. Continuing accumulation pattern. Target previous resistance ₹78. Hold 1-2 days.

Post-tariff crash recovery. TATAMOTORS hit 294 low (Apr 7), bounced with 3x avg volume indicating institutional buying. Pre-crash levels ~370-380. Nifty RSI 52 with room to run. EMA 9/21 crossover imminent.
trades.exit_reason: Exiting swing trade early to redeploy into hot intraday momentum stocks. TATAMOTORS barely moved (+0.4%), better opportunities in OLA Electric and JTL Industries today with real catalysts.

log.note: Market context: Nifty down -7.39% over 100 days, crashed to 22182 on Apr 7 (Trump tariff shock), massive recovery +7.7% in 2 days to 23926. TATAMOTORS: crashed 294, bounced 339. Deploying 97% capital into TATAMOTORS recovery trade. Stop at 310 protects against re-test of lows.

CLOSED Trade #1 NSE:TATAMOTORS @ ₹334.5 | WIN | P&L: ₹11.89 (0.12%) | Exiting swing trade early to redeploy into hot intraday momentum stocks. TATAMOTORS barely moved (+0.4%), better opportunities in OLA Electric and JTL Industries today with real catalysts.
